verses.text: God bids each tribe bring a rod with its prince's name. The rods. God will show His choice.
God bids each tribe bring a rod with its prince's name. The rods. God will show His choice.
God bids each tribe bring a rod with its prince's name. The rods. God will show His choice.
The rod of the chosen man shall blossom. The sign. Budding will settle the matter.
The rod of the chosen man shall blossom. The sign. Budding will settle the matter.
The rods are laid up before the testimony. Laid up. They wait God's verdict.
The rods are laid up before the testimony. Laid up. They wait God's verdict.
Aaron's rod buds, blossoms, and yields almonds. Budded. God confirms Aaron's priesthood.
Aaron's rod buds, blossoms, and yields almonds. Budded. God confirms Aaron's priesthood.
The rod is kept as a token against the rebels. Token. The wonder rebukes the murmurers.
The rod is kept as a token against the rebels. Token. The wonder rebukes the murmurers.
The people fear they shall all perish. Fear. They tremble at God's holiness.
The people fear they shall all perish. Fear. They tremble at God's holiness.
